title: Lag Remover
description: This is a simple plugin that removes lag on a server
body: Lag Remover is a lightweight Spigot/Bukkit plugin designed to keep your server running smoother by automatically removing excess dropped items and giving admins quick lag‑management tools. It periodically checks the world for dropped item entities and clears them once a configurable threshold is reached, reducing chunk load and FPS/TPS drops without manual intervention. A built‑in /lagclear command lets staff instantly remove dropped items (and optionally passive mobs) on demand, while /tps reports recent server tick rates when available. Configuration is simple, stored in plugins/LagBuster/config.yml, and includes auto‑clear timing, item thresholds, and optional debug logging.
